scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @zkroll/shared && npm run build --workspace @zkroll/contracts && npm run build --workspace @zkroll/api && npm run build --workspace @zkroll/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @zkroll/shared && npm run build --workspace @zkroll/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @zkroll/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @zkroll/web
